profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Diastika Biotekindo Tbk engages in the sale of disposable or consumable medical goods and diagnostic equipment in Indonesia. It operates through Clinical Diagnostic Group and Life Science Group segments. The company offers various products for detecting, diagnosing, and monitoring human disease. It also provides life science products that are processed from biological products. In addition, the company engages in general trading, laboratory equipment, research, medicine, export and import, pharmaceutical chemicals, services, electronics, and industrial activities. PT Diastika Biotekindo was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia. PT Diastika Biotekindo Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Optel Investama Mulia.
